//: Test-only compile. tsup builds the SHIPPED bundle (src/index.ts + workers, with the @opencodehub/* libs inlined); it does not emit the 38 *.test.ts files. This config tsc-compiles the full src tree — sources + tests — into dist-test/ (never published, gitignored) so `node --test` has runnable *.test.js. Not `composite` and `noEmit:false`: a leaf throwaway build, not part of the project-reference graph.
